yamlFileName: PM_01 - Camera Permission Allow.yaml
testName: PM_01 - Camera Permission Allow
atpSteps: 1. Camera permission popup appears → 2. Tap Allow → 3. Open camera from gallery
atpExpected: Camera permission granted and camera opens successfully

yamlFileName: PM_02 - Camera Permission Deny.yaml
testName: PM_02 - Camera Permission Deny
atpSteps: 1. Camera permission popup appears → 2. Tap Don't Allow
atpExpected: Flow continues to next permission; Permission Required NOT shown on first deny

yamlFileName: PM_03 - Camera Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
testName: PM_03 - Camera Permission Don't Ask Again
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Don't ask again + Don't allow → 3. Access camera
atpExpected: Permission Required → OK → Android Settings when camera accessed

yamlFileName: PM_04 - Camera Permission Settings Recovery.yaml
testName: PM_04 - Camera Permission Settings Recovery
atpSteps: 1. Deny camera → 2. Settings → 3. Grant camera → 4. Return

yamlFileName: PM_05 - Location Permission Precise Location.yaml
testName: PM_05 - Location Permission Precise Location
atpSteps: 1. Allow Camera → 2. Location popup → 3. Precise + While using
atpExpected: Precise location granted; Nearby Devices dialog next

yamlFileName: PM_06 - Location Permission Approximate Location.yaml
testName: PM_06 - Location Permission Approximate Location
atpSteps: 1. Allow Camera → 2. Location popup → 3. Approximate

yamlFileName: PM_07 - Location Permission Deny.yaml
testName: PM_07 - Location Permission Deny
atpSteps: 1. Allow Camera → 2. Location popup → 3. Don't allow
atpExpected: Flow continues to Nearby Devices on first deny

yamlFileName: PM_08 - Location Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
testName: PM_08 - Location Permission Don't Ask Again
atpSteps: 1. Location popup → 2. Don't ask again + deny
atpExpected: Permission Required → Settings when location needed

yamlFileName: PM_09 - Nearby Devices Permission Allow.yaml
testName: PM_09 - Nearby Devices Permission Allow
atpSteps: 1. Allow Camera + Location → 2. Nearby popup → 3. Allow
atpExpected: Nearby granted; next permission dialog appears

yamlFileName: PM_10 - Nearby Devices Permission Deny.yaml
testName: PM_10 - Nearby Devices Permission Deny
atpSteps: 1. Nearby popup → 2. Don't allow

yamlFileName: PM_11 - Nearby Devices Permission Enable Later.yaml
testName: PM_11 - Nearby Devices Permission Enable Later
atpSteps: 1. Deny Nearby → 2. Settings → enable → 3. Return

yamlFileName: PM_12 - Notification Permission Allow.yaml
testName: PM_12 - Notification Permission Allow
atpSteps: 1. Allow upstream → 2. Notification popup → 3. Allow
atpExpected: Notification granted; Photos dialog next; MY GALLERY reached

yamlFileName: PM_13 - Notification Permission Deny.yaml
testName: PM_13 - Notification Permission Deny
atpSteps: 1. Notification popup → 2. Don't allow
atpExpected: Flow continues to Photos on first deny

yamlFileName: PM_14 - Notification Permission Dismiss.yaml
testName: PM_14 - Notification Permission Dismiss
atpSteps: 1. Notification popup → 2. Dismiss if applicable

yamlFileName: PM_15 - Notification Permission Settings Recovery.yaml
testName: PM_15 - Notification Permission Settings Recovery
atpSteps: 1. Deny notification → 2. Settings → enable → 3. Return

yamlFileName: PM_16 - Photos and Videos Permission Allow All.yaml
testName: PM_16 - Photos and Videos Permission Allow All
atpSteps: 1. Photos popup → 2. Allow all
atpExpected: Full gallery accessible; MY GALLERY displayed

yamlFileName: PM_17 - Photos and Videos Permission Limited Access.yaml
testName: PM_17 - Photos and Videos Permission Limited Access
atpSteps: 1. Photos popup → 2. Allow limited access → 3. Select photos
atpExpected: Only selected photos visible in gallery

yamlFileName: PM_18 - Photos and Videos Permission Deny.yaml
testName: PM_18 - Photos and Videos Permission Deny
atpSteps: 1. Photos popup → 2. Don't allow (first time)
atpExpected: Gallery not accessible; retry or blocked state shown

yamlFileName: PM_19 - Photos and Videos Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
testName: PM_19 - Photos and Videos Permission Don't Ask Again
atpSteps: 1. Photos popup → 2. Don't ask again + deny

yamlFileName: PM_20 - Permission Flow Allow All Permissions.yaml
testName: PM_20 - Permission Flow Allow All Permissions
atpSteps: 1. Complete onboarding → 2. Allow all permissions in order

yamlFileName: PM_21 - Rotate Device During Permission Popup.yaml
testName: PM_21 - Rotate Device During Permission Popup
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Rotate → 3. Allow

yamlFileName: PM_22 - App Background During Permission Popup.yaml
testName: PM_22 - App Background During Permission Popup
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Background → 3. Resume → 4. Allow

yamlFileName: PM_23 - Lock Device During Permission Popup.yaml
testName: PM_23 - Lock Device During Permission Popup
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Lock → 3. Unlock → 4. Allow

yamlFileName: PM_24 - Incoming Call During Permission Popup.yaml
testName: PM_24 - Incoming Call During Permission Popup
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Interrupt → 3. Return → 4. Allow

yamlFileName: PM_25 - Rapid Permission Actions.yaml
testName: PM_25 - Rapid Permission Actions
atpSteps: 1. Rapidly tap Allow/Deny on camera popup

yamlFileName: PM_26 - App Kill During Permission Flow.yaml
testName: PM_26 - App Kill During Permission Flow
atpSteps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Force close → 3. Reopen → 4. Continue

yamlFileName: PM_28 - First Launch After Reinstall.yaml
testName: PM_28 - First Launch After Reinstall
atpSteps: 1. Clear app data → 2. Launch app → 3. Complete permission flow
atpExpected: Full onboarding + permission sequence from Camera; MY GALLERY reached

yamlFileName: PM_27 - Revoke Permission From Settings.yaml
testName: PM_27 - Revoke Permission From Settings
atpSteps: 1. Grant all → 2. Revoke in settings → 3. Return

yamlFileName: PM_29 - Nearby Devices Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
testName: PM_29 - Nearby Devices Permission Don't Ask Again
atpSteps: 1. Nearby popup → 2. Deny → 3. Complete flow → 4. Deny again on re-prompt

yamlFileName: PM_30 - Notification Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
testName: PM_30 - Notification Permission Don't Ask Again
atpSteps: 1. Notification popup → 2. Deny → 3. Complete flow → 4. Deny again on re-prompt
